title: ericoides mirum
side_effects: Ericoides mirum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged use of the plant has also been linked to liver damage and kidney problems, which can be fatal if left untreated. In some cases, ingestion of the plant has resulted in allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. Improper use of Ericoides mirum can also lead to an imbalance in the body's electrolyte levels, causing muscle weakness and fatigue.
